headline: Trump 🍊👑 inks Iran Nuke-No-Deal 💣🚫 & $300B Rebuild 💰🏗️
text: Trump 🍊👑 just dropped the MIC 🎤 at the G7 dinner 🍷🥐 in Versailles 👑🏰 and inked a 14-paragraph MoU ✍️📜 with Iran 🇮🇷 that ENDS the beef 🥩💥 and says NO NUKES 🛑☢️ FOREVER! The Strait of Hormuz 🌊🚢 gets reopened like a blocked OnlyFans 🫦💸 – oil prices 📉😭 about to chill! Iran promises zero nukes 🚫💣 and in return gets a $300BN 💰🍑 redevelopment jackpot 🏗️🤑, but the US ain’t paying a CENT 🪙🚫 – it’s all Gulf sugar daddies 🇦🇪👀 funding the glow-up! The clock ⏰ starts ticking: 60 days max to seal the final deal 🖊️💍, and the naval blockade 🚢⛓️ lifts within 30 days like a bad OnlyFans subscription 💳❌! Frozen Iranian assets ❄️💵 get thawed like Elsa on molly ❄️❄️❄️, while enriched uranium gets downblended 🔄⚗️ under IAEA eyeballs 👁️🔬! Sanctions get yeeted 🚀❌, but only if Iran stays in its lane 🛣️🚧 – it’s performance-based, baby, like OnlyFans tips for good behavior 💸🍆! Lebanon gets its sovereignty back 🕊️🇱🇧, Israel’s ops get iced ❄️🧊, and both sides pinky-swear 🤞 not to poke each other’s internal affairs 🏠🔒! Trump said stopping nukes was 99% of the mission 🎯💯, and now the US is back to pre-Feb 28 posture like it never even started beefing 🕰️🔙! Oil tankers sail free 🛳️💨, no tolls allowed 🚫💰, and Gulf states are hyped to build power plants ⚡️🏭 instead of bombs! It’s the ultimate glow-up: from Operation Epic Fury 🔥⚔️ to Operation Economic Glow 💸🌟 – Iran behaves, everyone cashes checks 📈💵, and the world avoids WW3 like a bad ex’s texts 📱🚫! Trump and Pezeshkian ✍️🤝 just made history – or at least a spicy UN Security Council flex 📜🔥!
